title: Index
content:
Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Alumni Meet 2023 Go Back Dec, 09 2023 at 09:00 am Jaypee University of Information Technology Waknaghat, Solan, Himachal Pradesh, India Alumni Meet 2023 Dear Alumni, JUIT Home Calling!!!! In the past, while seated in a classroom, taking evening strolls on the Mall, and singing songs on the stairs of the railway station on the campus, you would let your mind wander to visions of a future filled with achievement and wealth. We trust that you've realized those dreams. But now, it's time to pause and reflect on the past. We invite you to come together to relive your legacy with us and indulge in a nostalgic stroll along the paths of our shared history, discuss what lies ahead, and exchange tales of triumph. As an organizing team, we are delighted and feel deeply privileged to extend to you an invitation to the “ALUMNI MEET-2023: Rekindle, Reconnect & Reconciliation ” on 09 th December 2023, 9:00 AM onwards , specifically welcoming the super ten years of graduating batches (2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, & 2013). Your participation is important to us, and we would be honored to receive your suggestions and ideas to ensure the success of this Meet. To facilitate our preparations and approach this gathering with utmost enthusiasm, we kindly request you to fill out the Google form provided below. Additionally, if you are a member of your respective year's alumni WhatsApp group or LinkedIn page, we encourage you to share this information within your network. We eagerly anticipate your input and look forward to the opportunity to connect and interact with you all. Google form link: https://forms.gle/ cecSLWu9h7kxs8gdA Regards Organizing Team, Alumni Meet JUIT Alumni Cell Contact Details: Alumni Cell Faculty InCharge: 9882194150 (Dr. Saurabh Bansal) Alumni Cell Secretary: 7876858517 (Ms. Devanshi) Alumni Cell PR Head: 9873596333 (Ms. Unnati Pant) About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
